name: skillpacks
description: 20 production-ready Claude Code skills in 4 themed packs
author: avinashchby

packs.name: Solo Developer Essentials
packs.description: Everything a solo developer needs for professional git workflow

packs.name: Code Quality
packs.description: Automated code review, testing, documentation, and performance analysis

packs.name: Full-Stack Builder
packs.description: Scaffold APIs, components, auth, migrations, and deployment configs

packs.name: AI/MCP Developer
packs.description: Build MCP servers, optimize prompts, debug agents, set up RAG, and evaluate LLMs

plugins.name: solo-git-workflow
plugins.description: Smart conventional commits from staged changes

plugins.name: solo-pr-creator
plugins.description: AI-generated GitHub PRs with title, description, and reviewer suggestions

plugins.name: solo-dependency-updater
plugins.description: Check and update outdated dependencies with breaking change warnings

plugins.name: solo-release-notes
plugins.description: Generate release notes grouped by conventional commit type

plugins.name: solo-env-setup
plugins.description: Detect project type and verify dev environment setup

plugins.name: quality-review-checklist
plugins.description: Systematic code review covering security, performance, and accessibility

plugins.name: quality-test-generator
plugins.description: Generate comprehensive unit tests with edge case coverage

plugins.name: quality-doc-generator
plugins.description: Generate JSDoc/docstrings for exported functions with examples

plugins.name: quality-refactor-advisor
plugins.description: Identify code smells and suggest targeted refactorings

plugins.name: quality-perf-profiler
plugins.description: Identify N+1 queries, memory leaks, and performance bottlenecks

plugins.name: builder-api-scaffolder
plugins.description: Generate full CRUD API from data model description

plugins.name: builder-db-migration
plugins.description: Generate database migrations from schema diffs

plugins.name: builder-component-gen
plugins.description: Generate typed UI components with stories and tests

plugins.name: builder-auth-setup
plugins.description: Set up JWT or OAuth authentication with middleware

plugins.name: builder-deploy-config
plugins.description: Generate Dockerfile, CI/CD, and deployment configs

plugins.name: ai-mcp-server-creator
plugins.description: Scaffold complete MCP servers with tools and resources

plugins.name: ai-prompt-engineer
plugins.description: Optimize prompts for token efficiency and consistency

plugins.name: ai-agent-debugger
plugins.description: Debug agent workflows and identify stuck loops

plugins.name: ai-rag-pipeline
plugins.description: Set up complete RAG pipeline with vector store

plugins.name: ai-eval-harness
plugins.description: Create LLM evaluation harnesses with metrics and comparisons
